title: Restore lichen-node no_std build
description: Discovered during project-LICHEN-2auf.44.7 final Rust review: cargo check --locked -p lichen-node --no-default-features fails because unconditional hybrid/routing modules import std-gated GradientTable and use unavailable floating-point sin/cos methods. Restore the crate's declared no_std configuration without weakening std behavior or tests.
acceptance_criteria: cargo check --locked -p lichen-node --no-default-features passes; std tests and clippy remain green; three independent reviews pass.
